emails.subject: Incorrect charge on my account - need immediate resolution
emails.body:
Hello,

I noticed an unauthorized charge of $149.99 on my account this month. I never authorized this billing and demand a full refund immediately. This is completely unacceptable.

My account number is ACC-78234. Please investigate this billing error and credit my account. I have been a customer for 3 years and this kind of mistake is very frustrating.

Regards,
Michael Torres

emails.subject: Cannot log in to my account - forgot password
emails.body:
Hi,

I am unable to log in to my account. I have tried resetting my password twice but I keep getting an error message saying 'invalid token'. The reset link in the email does not seem to work.

My username is jsmith_2020. Please help me regain access to my account as soon as possible. I have important documents stored there.

Thanks,
Jane Smith

emails.subject: Where is my order #ORD-992341?
emails.body:
Hello Customer Support,

I placed an order (#ORD-992341) 5 days ago but I have not received any shipping confirmation. The estimated delivery was 3 days ago. Could you please provide an update on the status of my order?

I live at 142 Oak Street, Portland OR 97201.

Best,
Robert Chen

emails.subject: Pricing for enterprise plan - 500 user licenses
emails.body:
Hi,

We are a mid-size company (DataFlow Inc.) looking to evaluate your enterprise plan for approximately 500 users. Could you provide pricing information and arrange a demo?

We are currently comparing several vendors and would like to make a decision within 2 weeks.

Please contact our procurement team lead at p.williams@dataflow.com

Regards,
Priya Williams
Head of IT Procurement

emails.subject: Question about employee benefits enrollment deadline
emails.body:
Hello HR Team,

I joined the company 3 months ago and I'm not sure when the benefits enrollment window closes. Can you let me know the deadline for health insurance and 401k enrollment for new employees?

Also, is there a guide for the enrollment process?

Thank you,
Alex Park
Employee ID: EMP-44521

emails.subject: URGENT: Production database is completely down - all customers affected
emails.body:
CRITICAL ISSUE - Production database server DOWN

Our entire production database has been unreachable for the past 45 minutes. All 2,000 of our customers cannot access the system. We are losing approximately $3,000 per minute.

Error: Connection refused on port 5432. All replicas are also unreachable.

This is causing significant business impact. We need an engineer on this IMMEDIATELY.

Incident ID: INC-2025-0310
Account: ENTERPRISE-7821
Contact: David Kumar (CTO) - +1-555-0123

emails.body:
CONGRATULATIONS WINNER!!!

You have been selected as the lucky winner of our international lottery!! You have won ONE MILLION DOLLARS ($1,000,000)!!!

To claim your prize, click here: http://suspicious-link.xyz/claim

You must respond within 24 hours or your prize will be forfeited!! Provide your bank account details to receive your winnings.

This is NOT spam. You are a genuine winner!

Claim your FREE MONEY now!

Lottery International Committee

emails.subject: Immediate full refund required - VIP account billing error
emails.body:
I am extremely dissatisfied with the repeated billing errors on my VIP account.

This is the THIRD time this quarter I have been incorrectly charged. The latest erroneous charge is $892.50 applied on March 9th. My contract clearly states a fixed monthly fee of $299.

I need:
1. Immediate full refund of $892.50
2. Written explanation of how this keeps happening
3. Assurance this will never happen again

I have been a premium customer for 5 years and I am seriously considering cancelling if this is not resolved today.

Sarah Mitchell
VIP Account #VIP-0042

emails.subject: Feature request: Add dark mode to the mobile app
emails.body:
Hi Product Team,

I've been using your app for about 6 months now and overall I'm very happy with it. One feature I'd really love to see is dark mode support for the mobile app.

Many people use the app in low-light environments and dark mode would be much easier on the eyes. It would also improve battery life on OLED screens.

I know this is probably on your roadmap already but just wanted to add my voice to the request!

Thanks for the great product,
Tom Bradley

emails.subject: CRITICAL: My account has been hacked - unauthorized access detected
emails.body:
My account has been compromised. I received alerts that someone logged in from Russia at 3 AM this morning. I did not authorize this access.

I can see that the attacker changed my email address and attempted to access payment information. I have already changed my password but I am worried they may have already stolen data.

My account: linda.park@securecorp.com (Account #SEC-8821)

Please IMMEDIATELY:
1. Lock my account
2. Revert unauthorized changes
3. Investigate what data was accessed
4. Provide a full security audit

This is an emergency. I need a response within 1 hour.

Linda Park

emails.subject: Question about my monthly invoice - line item clarification
emails.body:
Hello Billing Team,

I received my monthly invoice for February and I have a question about a line item. There is a charge listed as 'Professional Services Add-on - $45.00' that I don't recall signing up for.

Can you clarify what this charge is for? If it's something I'm not using, I would like to know how to remove it from my plan.

My account number is ACC-56732.

Thank you,
Carlos Mendez

emails.subject: Repeated billing errors - 4 months of incorrect charges - extremely frustrated
emails.body:
I am writing this email as a FINAL WARNING before I escalate to my bank and file a chargeback.

For the past 4 consecutive months, I have been billed incorrectly:
- November: Overcharged by $87.50
- December: Overcharged by $87.50
- January: Overcharged by $87.50
- February: Overcharged by $87.50

Total: $350 in erroneous charges that I have reported EVERY SINGLE MONTH.

Each time I report it, I am told it is fixed and then it happens again the next month. This is either gross incompetence or fraud.

I demand:
1. Immediate refund of $350
2. Written root cause analysis
3. $100 service credit for my wasted time
4. Guarantee this will not happen again

I will be sharing this experience publicly if not resolved within 48 hours.

Frustrated beyond words,
Amanda Richardson
Account: PREM-3301

emails.subject: API integration consistently failing - breaking our production pipeline
emails.body:
Dear Technical Support,

We are experiencing a critical issue with your REST API that is breaking our production data pipeline.

Details:
- Endpoint: /api/v2/data/export
- Error: 504 Gateway Timeout after exactly 30 seconds
- Frequency: 100% failure rate since March 8th, 15:00 UTC
- Our account: ENT-9921

We have tried:
1. Reducing payload size (no improvement)
2. Switching to async mode (same error)
3. Using different API credentials (same error)
4. Contacting your status page (shows all green, which is incorrect)

This is blocking our nightly data exports affecting 500 downstream users. We need this resolved urgently.

Please escalate to your API infrastructure team.

Best,
Dr. James O'Brien
CTO, DataStream Analytics

emails.subject: Request to permanently close my account
emails.body:
Hello,

After 5 years as a customer, I have made the difficult decision to close my account. I will be transitioning to a competitor due to the recent price increases which no longer fit our budget.

I would like to:
1. Export all my data before the account is closed
2. Understand the account closure process and timeline
3. Confirm that my data will be deleted per GDPR requirements
4. Get confirmation of the final billing date

Please advise on the steps I need to take. I would like the account closed by March 31st.

Thank you for 5 years of service.

Regards,
Niamh O'Sullivan
Account: STD-44892

emails.subject: URGENT: Payment processing failure affecting entire business operations
emails.body:
This is an EMERGENCY.

Our enterprise payment processing has completely failed. We have been unable to process any customer payments for the past 2 hours. This is directly impacting our revenue at approximately $15,000 per hour.

All payment attempts return: 'Transaction declined - Gateway Error 8821'

Affected accounts: All 3 of our production merchant accounts (IDs: MERCH-001, MERCH-002, MERCH-003)

We have a major promotional event happening right now with peak traffic. Every minute of downtime is catastrophic.

This is a CRITICAL VIP account issue. We need your payment team on this call within 15 minutes.

Account Manager: Contact our CTO directly: +1-555-0199
Account: ENTERPRISE-VIP-0007

emails.subject: Please update my shipping address
emails.body:
Hi,

I recently moved and need to update my shipping address on file.

Old address: 55 Maple Ave, Boston MA 02101
New address: 200 Harbor View Drive, Boston MA 02108

Please update this before my next order ships.

Thanks,
Kevin Walsh
Account: STD-22781

emails.subject: Invoice discrepancy from last month needs clarification
emails.body:
Hello,

My invoice from February shows a discrepancy of $23. According to my contract, I should be on the $199/month plan, but I was charged $222. This has happened twice before.

Could you look into this billing discrepancy and correct it?

Thank you,
Yuki Tanaka
Account: STD-88123

emails.subject: App crashes every time I try to upload files over 10MB
emails.body:
Hi Support,

The desktop application crashes consistently whenever I try to upload any file larger than 10MB. This started happening after the update to version 4.2.1 last week.

OS: Windows 11, App version 4.2.1
Error log attached (relevant line): 'OutOfMemoryException at FileUploadService.cs line 142'

This is impacting my daily workflow as I frequently need to upload large datasets.

Please advise on a fix or provide a workaround.

Best,
Marco Bianchi

emails.subject: Potential strategic partnership inquiry
emails.body:
Dear Business Development Team,

I represent CloudBridge Technologies, a middleware solutions company with 50,000 enterprise clients globally.

We believe a strategic partnership between our companies could be highly mutually beneficial. We would like to explore:
1. White-label integration opportunities
2. Co-marketing arrangements
3. API ecosystem collaboration

Would you be open to an introductory call?

Best regards,
Elena Volkov
VP Business Development
CloudBridge Technologies

Gift Card Rewards Program

tasks.title: Email Department Routing
tasks.objective: Classify each incoming email to the correct department (Billing, Technical Support, Account Management, Sales, HR, or General). Read each email carefully before classifying.

tasks.title: Priority Assignment and Spam Detection
tasks.objective: Assign the correct priority level (Critical, High, Medium, Low) to each email and detect spam. One email in this batch is spam - identify and mark it. Also classify each legitimate email to the correct department and add relevant tags.

tasks.title: Full Triage and Response Drafting
tasks.objective: Perform full email triage for each email: read it, classify to the correct department, assign priority, add relevant tags, and draft a professional customer response. Responses must be professional, empathetic, and address the customer's specific concerns using relevant keywords.
